official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound open_book packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official open_book body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns open_book to packet id 0x3a.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the open_book id to ClientboundOpenBookPacket.
The official open_book body is one InteractionHand enum ordinal through FriendlyByteBuf.writeEnum/readEnum.
The fixture uses an enum constructor value and does not require initialized item, inventory, screen, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove held item, book UI behavior, inventory state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer held item, book UI behavior, inventory state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
